definition_cleanup.hidden_generic_warning_zh: hidden_generic_warning 是由 hidden monitor 触发导出的文字条件，只说 prefix 某处有风险，不给位置。
definition_cleanup.hidden_localized_warning_zh: hidden_localized_warning 是由 hidden monitor 选出的自动边界可见 span，再把该 span 作为文字提醒给模型。
definition_cleanup.hidden_signal_en: A hidden signal is the component-state risk score read after teacher-forced causal prefill over residual, MLP, token-mixer/attention, and norm outputs.
definition_cleanup.hidden_signal_zh: hidden signal 是 teacher-forced causal prefill 后读取的 residual/MLP/token-mixer(attention)/norm component 状态及其 E61 validity-direction 风险分数。
definition_cleanup.not_proven_by_e167_zh: E167 不能直接证明 hidden signal 能让模型做对原本不会做的题；E171 才以原题 baseline 错误为入口检验这个 claim。

pipeline_guards: Baseline prompts use only the original problem and a generic non-thinking solve template.
Rescue cases are built only from same-model original-problem baseline failures.
Hidden trigger selection uses the E166 calibrated component key and threshold on the model's own wrong trace.
No oracle/manual span is included in E171 repair variants.
The .pt cache stores component vectors, directions, centers, and prefix metadata for later residual/MLP/attention/norm analysis.
